title: spawn_blocking for OS keychain calls is correct
description: OS keychain APIs (Security.framework, Credential Manager, D-Bus Secret Service) are synchronous and can block for non-trivial durations. Putting them in spawn_blocking prevents stalling the async executor. A contributor might be tempted to remove spawn_blocking to simplify the code — don't. The alternative (running blocking I/O on the async executor) causes latency spikes and can deadlock single-threaded runtimes.
